## Project: Currency Converter

This is a React-based Currency Converter application built with Vite that integrates with the currencyapi.com API for real-time currency exchange rates.

### Key Features
- Real-time currency conversion using currencyapi.com API
- Support for 150+ currencies
- Input fields for amount entry
- Dropdown menus for currency selection
- Currency swap functionality
- Responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Real-time exchange rate display
- Error handling with user-friendly messages

### Technologies Used
- React 19
- Vite 7
- CSS3 with flexbox and gradients
- currencyapi.com REST API

### Project Setup Complete ✅

The following has been configured:
1. ✅ Vite React project scaffolded
2. ✅ Currency converter component implemented with full functionality
3. ✅ Responsive CSS styling applied
4. ✅ API integration for real-time rates
5. ✅ Error handling and loading states
6. ✅ Documentation and setup guide created

### Next Steps to Use

1. **Get API Key** (Free): Visit https://currencyapi.com/ and sign up
2. **Update App.jsx**: Add your API key to line 14 in src/App.jsx
3. **Run Development Server**: Execute `npm install` then `npm run dev`
4. **Access Application**: Open http://localhost:5173/ in your browser

### Documentation Files
- `README.md` - Complete project documentation
- `SETUP_GUIDE.md` - Quick setup instructions
- `src/App.jsx` - Main converter component
- `src/App.css` - Component styling
- `src/index.css` - Global styles

### API Integration
The app uses two main API endpoints:
1. `/currencies` - Fetch list of available currencies
2. `/latest` - Get real-time exchange rates

All API calls are made with proper error handling and loading states.
